prompt:
Generate a photorealistic 8K selfie portrait taken from a high angle. The subject is a stunning young woman with waist-length, healthy dark brown hair styled in a large loose braid draped over one shoulder to the front, tied with a cream ribbon. A few strands and small wisps drift across her face in the breeze.

Facial features: Large almond-shaped eyes with a warm light brown iris and long naturally curled lashes. Dewy makeup with soft pink blush on cheeks and nose tip. Lips finished with a gradient pink lip gloss for a full, moisturized look. Skin is radiant and luminous with soft light reflecting across the face.
She has an hourglass figure with a full bust.

Pose: Standing upright, holding the camera slightly above eye level as if taking a selfie. A classic black bag hangs from her belt. Expression is warm and sweet, gazing directly into the lens.

Outfit: Traditional-inspired ensemble consisting of a cream-colored textured dress, a black embroidered vest featuring intricate floral metal embellishments, and a wide gold belt with circular decorative details. Accessories include gold drop earrings and a delicate gold necklace catching the sunlight.

Setting: Natural outdoor environment. Stone pathway in the foreground, lush green grass and trees in the background, open sky with soft clouds. No artificial bokeh or depth blur, realistic depth and crisp environmental detail throughout.

Color palette: Warm neutrals, muted greens, gold accents
Lighting: Natural warm sunlight, front-facing, with soft highlights on face, eyes, and jewelry
Contrast: Balanced and realistic
Mood: Elegant, serene, timeless
Aspect ratio: 2:3 | Shot type: Full body, high angle
